roles.name: Time Lord Architect
roles.description: Gallifreyan elder who shapes the timelines of the solution — sees every paradox before it forms.

roles.name: TARDIS Pilot
roles.description: Steers the delivery vessel through the time vortex — keeps the crew alive and the schedule intact.

roles.name: UNIT Quartermaster
roles.description: Keeper of the records, kit, and clearances — every layout, permset and field accounted for.

roles.name: Sonic Engineer
roles.description: Wielder of the sonic screwdriver — builds Apex, LWC and platform code for any lock that won't open.

roles.name: Academy Don of Prydonia
roles.description: Senior Time Lord of the Prydonian Chapter — sets standards for all Salesforce craft and mentors the cardinals.

roles.name: Senior Companion
roles.description: Travels at the Doctor's side through the harder adventures — leads discovery and configuration.

roles.name: Companion Initiate
roles.description: First-trip traveller, learning the console and the customer's universe one stop at a time.

roles.name: Vortex Bridge Architect
roles.description: Designer of the Eye-of-Harmony spans between Salesforce and worlds beyond — middleware and event flows.

roles.name: Riftwatcher of Cardiff
roles.description: Senior engineer guarding the Cardiff Rift — APIs, queues and inbound storms.

roles.name: Riftwatcher Apprentice
roles.description: Learns the patterns of the Rift — webhooks, batches, callouts, and the right way to fail.

roles.name: Medical Officer of the TARDIS
roles.description: Tends the wounded build — finds regenerations needed before the patient reaches the customer.

roles.name: Voice of the Shadow Proclamation
roles.description: Speaks for the cause across the galaxies — leads marketing strategy with proclamation-level authority.

roles.name: Herald of the Ood
roles.description: Channels the song of campaigns — strategy, segmentation, and the long-form narrative.

roles.name: Psychic Paper Designer
roles.description: Creates the artefact that says exactly what the audience needs to read — content, creative, daily run.

roles.name: Adipose Industries Analyst
roles.description: Translates between mortal customer and Time Lord — captures requirements without losing weight.

roles.name: Senior Sonic Engineer
roles.description: Veteran of the workshop in Totter's Lane — owns the gnarly Apex, async, and platform internals.

roles.name: Cloister Bell Initiate
roles.description: Newest aboard the TARDIS — runs the Cloister Bell checks and pairs on configuration.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every era starts at least one month in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2-3 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set.

realms.projectName: Nu-Who RTD Era — Bad Wolf Analytics Rollout
Moffat Era — Crack-in-the-Wall Time Stream Platform
Chibnall & RTD2 Era — Flux Recovery Implementation

classic-doctors.name: TARDIS Departs Totter's Lane
classic-doctors.description: Discovery sign-off — junkyard doors close, time rotor begins.

classic-doctors.name: Reverse the Polarity
classic-doctors.description: Build kickoff: neutron flow inverted, console live.

classic-doctors.name: High Council Audit
classic-doctors.description: Mid-project gate: review on Gallifrey before the Time Lords.

classic-doctors.name: Genesis of the Daleks
classic-doctors.description: Phase invoice trigger: pivotal Skaro engagement billed in full.

classic-doctors.name: The Regeneration Hand-off
classic-doctors.description: Hyper-care close: previous incarnation passes the keys.

nu-who-rtd-era.name: Nestene Awakens — Project Kickoff
nu-who-rtd-era.description: Project kickoff: shop-window dummies stir, Auton invasion drill begins.

nu-who-rtd-era.name: Bad Wolf Trail Lit
nu-who-rtd-era.description: Build phase: graffiti markers connected end-to-end.

nu-who-rtd-era.name: The Doctor Dances
nu-who-rtd-era.description: UAT gate: Empty Child cured — everybody lives.

nu-who-rtd-era.name: DoctorDonna Activated
nu-who-rtd-era.description: Go-Live: meta-crisis fires, full reporting metaphor live in production.

nu-who-rtd-era.name: End of Time — Hyper-care
nu-who-rtd-era.description: Hyper-care close: knock four times — handover complete.

nu-who-rtd-era.name: Final Voyage Invoice
nu-who-rtd-era.description: Final invoice: the long way round, settled.

moffat-era.name: The Pandorica Opens
moffat-era.description: Build: the perfect prison forged from Stonehenge upward.

moffat-era.name: A Good Man Goes to War
moffat-era.description: Solution review at Demons Run before the muster.

moffat-era.name: The Day of the Doctor
moffat-era.description: Go-Live: all thirteen incarnations cut over Gallifrey at once.

moffat-era.name: Heaven Sent — Diamond Wall
moffat-era.description: Project close: 4.5 billion years of patient hyper-care.

moffat-era.name: Final Reckoning at the Vault
moffat-era.description: Final invoice: 70 years guarding Missy, settled.

chibnall-rtd2-era.name: The Woman Who Fell to Earth
chibnall-rtd2-era.description: Kickoff in Sheffield: Tim Shaw audit, Fam assembled.

chibnall-rtd2-era.name: Spyfall — Master Returns
chibnall-rtd2-era.description: Discovery: classified threat assessment with O at MI6.

chibnall-rtd2-era.name: Flux Damage Containment
chibnall-rtd2-era.description: Build: half the universe rebuilt, Division records re-shelved.

chibnall-rtd2-era.name: The Giggle — Bi-Generation
chibnall-rtd2-era.description: UAT acceptance: two Doctors signed off, Toymaker's game closed.

chibnall-rtd2-era.name: Empire of Death — Go-Live
chibnall-rtd2-era.description: Go-Live + handoff: Sutekh defeated, Ruby's mystery resolved.

chibnall-rtd2-era.name: 73 Yards Final Invoice
chibnall-rtd2-era.description: Final invoice from the Welsh coast walk.

Sarah Jane Smith.notes: Bannerman Road — K9 maintenance and Mr Smith firmware update.

Susan Foreman.notes: Coal Hill School term exams — must not miss History.

Fourth Doctor (Tom Baker).notes: Jelly baby restock and scarf darning at the seamstress.

Rose Tyler.notes: Powell Estate — chips with Mum and Mickey.

Captain Jack Harkness.notes: Cardiff Hub — Torchwood quarterly review (and flirting).

Donna Noble.notes: Chiswick wedding rehearsal — DO NOT mention bees.

Wilfred Mott.notes: Stargazing on the hill — comet expected.

Amy Pond.notes: Leadworth — kissogram booking she can't get out of.

Yasmin Khan.notes: South Yorkshire Police — refresher firearms training.

Graham O'Brien.notes: Cancer check-up at Sheffield General — annual.

Ruby Sunday.notes: Carla's foster-home open day — Ruby Road.
